printed date and serial #
    1821 on top and 1825 or 1826 in center (reissue)

"Operation Bernhard" counterfeit (produced by specialists in 
    German Concentration Camps)
    Very difficult to distinguish from genuine notes; generally the conterfeits 
    have differences in the portrait of "Britannia"
    left: genuine - right counterfeit
